short_uz: Grip va OʻRVI davolash uchun antivirus preparat
short_en: Antiviral drug for flu and ARVI treatment
full_uz: Yuqori nafas yo'llari virusli infeksiyalarini (OʻRVI) va gripni davolash hamda oldini olish uchun mo'ljallangan.
full_en: Designed for the treatment and prevention of acute respiratory viral infections and influenza.

short_uz: B1, B6, B12 vitaminlari asosidagi kombinatsiyalangan dori
short_en: Combination drug based on vitamins B1, B6, B12
full_uz: Nerv tizimi faoliyatini yaxshilash uchun B guruh vitaminlari va lidokain saqlovchi in'eksion dori vositasi.
full_en: An injectable medicine containing B-group vitamins and lidocaine to support nervous system function.

full_uz: Yurak va miya arteriyalarida tromboz xavfini kamaytirish maqsadida qo'llaniladigan atsetilsalitsil kislotasi asosidagi dori.
full_en: An acetylsalicylic acid-based medicine used to reduce the risk of thrombosis in heart and brain arteries.
